evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system using collaborative filtering, content-based ranking, sentence-transformer embeddings, and gradient-boosted models
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. The system uses item-item similarity (via sentence-transformer embeddings) for cold starts and a gradient-boosted model trained on engagement signals for warm users.

evidence.claim: Managed feature pipeline with ~200 features and A/B testing infrastructure
evidence.source_text: Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features) and the A/B testing infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% via recommendation system launch
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.
Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling pipeline, feature pipeline, and training/eval workflow
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments), the feature pipeline, and the training/eval workflow.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% through ranking model
Acted as de-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Earned Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification
evidence.source_text: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2024)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes practical experience over theoretical background
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Believes retrieval problems are evaluation problems in disguise
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.
